# Polaris documentation

> Documentation for Polaris, a market data platform for discovering, downloading, and querying frontier market datasets across crypto derivatives, RWAs, and compute markets.

Use this file to choose the right Polaris page for the job.

Start with `Catalog` when you need exact market IDs, venue coverage, or historical bounds before making API or SDK requests.

Start with `Snapshots` and `Download` when you want bulk historical files.

Start with `Trades`, `Events`, or `OHLCV` when you already know the market and need query patterns for recent or historical data in code.

## Start here

- [Introduction](https://docs.polaris.supply/index.md): Overview of Polaris, what it is for, and the main product surfaces.
- [Quickstart](https://docs.polaris.supply/quickstart.md): Install the CLI, browse datasets, and download your first data.
- [Authentication](https://docs.polaris.supply/guides/authentication.md): When public access is enough and when to add a Polaris API key.
- [Market coverage](https://docs.polaris.supply/markets/market-coverage.md): High-level venue coverage across perpetuals, options, RWAs, and compute markets.
- [Standardised formats](https://docs.polaris.supply/reference/standardised-formats.md): Canonical cross-venue event envelope and typed payloads.

## Access and support

- [Account](https://www.polaris.supply/account): Log in to fetch your Polaris API key and manage your current plan.
- [Telegram support](https://t.me/hilliamt): Start a Telegram conversation for support, pricing questions, and general enquiries.

## API reference

- [API overview](https://docs.polaris.supply/reference/api-reference.md): Choose the right Polaris REST endpoint and navigate to focused reference pages.
- [Catalog](https://docs.polaris.supply/reference/catalog.md): `GET /catalog` for market discovery, coverage, and bounds.
- [Snapshots](https://docs.polaris.supply/reference/snapshots.md): `GET /snapshots` for historical file listing, including raw snapshot discovery notes.
- [Download](https://docs.polaris.supply/reference/download.md): `GET /download` for file retrieval by snapshot key.

## SDKs

- [Python SDK](https://docs.polaris.supply/sdks/python.md): Python client for market discovery, snapshots, replay, trades, events, and OHLCV.
- [TypeScript SDK](https://docs.polaris.supply/sdks/typescript.md): TypeScript client for market discovery, snapshots, replay, trades, events, and OHLCV.
- [Rust SDK](https://docs.polaris.supply/sdks/rust.md): Rust client setup and authentication.

## Query patterns

- [Trades](https://docs.polaris.supply/sdks/trades.md): Query normalized trade events with `client.trades()`.
- [Events](https://docs.polaris.supply/sdks/events.md): Query mixed normalized event streams with `client.events()`.
- [OHLCV](https://docs.polaris.supply/sdks/ohlcv.md): Query interval-aligned OHLCV bars with `client.ohlcv()`.
- [Example Notebooks](https://docs.polaris.supply/guides/jupyter-notebook-quickstart.md): Notebook setup plus curated Polaris Python examples using pandas and matplotlib.
